name: LAKE LAW, PLLC
description_short: LAKE LAW, PLLC is a credit repair provider based in Seattle, Washington. Rated 4.7/5 with 82 Google reviews, reflecting excellent customer satisfaction.
description_long:
LAKE LAW, PLLC is a credit repair provider serving clients in Seattle, Washington. Carrying a 4.7/5.0 Google rating from 82 reviews, LAKE LAW, PLLC has an excellent reputation among consumers in the Seattle area looking to repair and improve their credit scores.

Operating as a civil law attorney, consumer advice center, general practice attorney, LAKE LAW, PLLC provides a range of services for consumers seeking credit repair solutions. Additional information about their services and processes can typically be found on their website.

When evaluating credit repair services in Seattle, consumers should look for providers that dispute directly with all three credit bureaus — Equifax, Experian, and TransUnion. Key differentiators include transparency around pricing, realistic timelines for results, and whether the company offers a money-back guarantee. LAKE LAW, PLLC operates in a highly regulated industry under the Credit Repair Organizations Act (CROA), which requires written contracts, a three-day cancellation window, and prohibits upfront fees before services are rendered.

Consumers in the Seattle, Washington area who are considering LAKE LAW, PLLC should contact the company directly to discuss their specific situation and get current pricing information. As with any credit repair provider, it is advisable to compare multiple options, verify licensing and credentials, and read recent customer reviews before making a decision.
